mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM tb_health_checkup_plan
ORDER BY plan_year DESC, created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_health_checkup_plan (plan_year, checkup_type, plan_name, target_dept, target_count, completed_count, hazard_factors, hospital, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, status, notes, created_by, created_by_name, created_by_dept, plan_approver_user_id, plan_approver_team, plan_approver_position, plan_approver_name, completion_approver_user_id, completion_approver_team, completion_approver_position, completion_approver_name, writer, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{planYear}, #{checkupType}, #{planName}, #{targetDept}, #{targetCount}, #{completedCount}, #{hazardFactors}, #{hospital}, #{planStartDate}, #{planEndDate}, #{status}, #{notes}, #{createdBy}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByDept}, #{planApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planApproverTeam}, #{planApproverPosition}, #{planApproverName}, #{completionApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{completionApproverTeam}, #{completionApproverPosition}, #{completionApproverName}, #{writer}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_health_checkup_plan SET plan_year = #{planYear}, checkup_type = #{checkupType}, plan_name = #{planName}, target_dept = #{targetDept}, target_count = #{targetCount}, completed_count = #{completedCount}, hazard_factors = #{hazardFactors}, hospital = #{hospital}, plan_start_date = #{planStartDate}, plan_end_date = #{planEndDate}, status = #{status}, notes = #{notes}, plan_approver_user_id = #{planApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_approver_team = #{planApproverTeam}, plan_approver_position = #{planApproverPosition}, plan_approver_name = #{planApproverName}, completion_approver_user_id = #{completionApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, completion_approver_team = #{completionApproverTeam}, completion_approver_position = #{completionApproverPosition}, completion_approver_name = #{completionApproverName}, writer = #{writer}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_health_checkup_plan SET status = #{status}, plan_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE plan_approved_at END, plan_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE plan_approved_by END, completion_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE completion_approved_at END, completion_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE completion_approved_by END, reject_reason = CASE WHEN #{rejectReason} IS NOT NULL THEN #{rejectReason} ELSE reject_reason END, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
